name: shared-learning emission does not include the source IP address in the payload
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/community/shared-learning/emit.sh" --opt-in --simulate-egress --dry-run 2>out.txt && ! grep -qE 'ip_addr|client_ip|source_ip' out.txt && grep -q 'no_ip_collection=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
